step_1_clarify.title: 1. Let's Understand Your Request
step_1_clarify.description: I'll ask clarifying questions to understand exactly what you need
questions: What are you trying to accomplish? (e.g., 'Add user login', 'Create a report page')
Who will use this feature? (e.g., 'Admin users', 'All customers')
What's the expected outcome? (e.g., 'Users can log in with email', 'Show sales data in a table')
Any specific constraints or requirements? (e.g., 'Must be mobile-friendly', 'Should save to database')

step_2_document.title: 2. Creating Specification
step_2_document.description: Based on your answers, I'll create a clear technical specification

step_3_validate.title: 3. Confirming Details
step_3_validate.description: Let me confirm these details are correct before we proceed:

step_4_translate.title: 4. Converting to Technical Plan
step_4_translate.description: Here's what the development team will build:

component_creation.title: Creating UI Component
steps: 2. Will it accept any user input?

api_creation.title: Creating API Endpoint
steps: 1. What data will this API work with?
2. Should it get data, create, update, or delete?

database_change.title: Database Changes
steps: 1. What new information needs to be stored?
3. How should it connect to existing data?

error_messages.incomplete_request: I need a bit more information to create a clear plan. Let me ask you a few questions:
error_messages.ambiguous_requirement: This sounds good, but let me make sure we're on the same page:
error_messages.success_message: Perfect! I have everything I need. Let me create the specification:

feature_handoff.title: Ready to Build
feature_handoff.message: Your requirements are clear and documented. The development team is ready to build this feature. Should I proceed?
